positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a friendly forest creature (like a badger wearing a tiny crown) having tea with a group of smiling woodland animals. The style is soft, storybook watercolor with golden accents, highly charming, and inviting. Dreamy, storybook art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, dark, aggressive, mechanical
